description: Performance optimization: Server Components + Memo + CSS animations replacing framer-motion in MonthGrid, EventCard, DayView

changes: Converted Dashboard to Server Component (RSC)
Converted Calendar to Server Component (RSC)
Replaced framer-motion with CSS animations in MonthGrid (42 buttons)
Replaced framer-motion with CSS animations in EventCard
Replaced framer-motion with CSS animations in DayView
Added React.memo to prevent re-renders
Code-split EventForm and DeleteEventModal
Removed margin transition causing CLS
Deferred theme script
Added CSS containment for paint isolation

description: Event card edit button + auth redirect to dashboard

changes: Changed EventCard from clickable-card to separate edit button on right side
Added PencilSimple icon edit button to EventCard
Replaced onClick prop with onEdit prop in EventCard
Updated all EventCard usages (dashboard, calendar, day-view)
Converted sign-in page to Server Component with auth check
Converted sign-up page to Server Component with auth check
Added redirect('/dashboard') for already-authenticated users

description: Font display swap + preconnect + image priority optimizations

changes: Added display: swap to Google Fonts
Added preconnect for fonts.gstatic.com
Added preconnect/dns-prefetch for Clerk
Added priority loading to landing nav image
Added priority loading to auth layout image
Added lazy loading to sidebar image
asi.remaining_issue: LCP still 9.4s due to text-based LCP element requiring custom font download

description: New performant landing page with original copy - LCP reduced 50%

changes: Restored original hero copy
Restored original feature card copy
Restored bottom CTA card
Removed all framer-motion animations
Used system fonts for heading (CSS LCP optimization)
Simplified logo to text/icon (no Image LCP)
Server Component - zero JS hydration
SVG icons instead of icon library

name: Performance optimization for dashboard - LCP, fonts, scripts

description: Performance optimizations: preconnect links, font preload, lazy analytics, data-scroll-behavior

asi.analytics: moved to lazy load after 1s delay
asi.date_fns: attempted tree-shaking but reverted due to module format

name: Aggressive dashboard perf - dynamic import, deferred components

description: Fix LCP: render header immediately with system font, hydrate user name async

changes: Removed isLoaded from blocking condition - render header immediately
Changed h1 to system font instead of custom font
Show placeholder '...' until user name hydrates
asi.lcp_issue: Header with user name was blocking on Clerk auth + custom font

description: Fix React hydration error #418 with mounted state and suppressHydrationWarning

changes: Added mounted state to avoid hydration mismatch
Added suppressHydrationWarning to h1 element
User name only shows after client mount + Clerk loaded

description: Pass user first name from server - eliminate client-side wait for Clerk

changes: Server now fetches user first name via currentUser() from Clerk
Passes userFirstName as prop to DashboardClient
Client no longer waits for Clerk to load user name
Removed mounted state - no longer needed
asi.expected_improvement: LCP should drop significantly since greeting renders immediately with server-provided name
